source.notes: Numeric identifiers and canonical names follow the BACnet engineering-units enumeration. Reserved/proprietary range markers are intentionally omitted; only standardized metrics are listed.

metrics.name: power-factor
metrics.description: Ratio of real to apparent power (-1..1)

metrics.name: grams-of-water-per-kilogram-dry-air
metrics.display_name: Grams Of Water Per Kilogram Dry Air

metrics.name: watts-per-square-meter-degree-kelvin
metrics.display_name: Watts Per Square Meter Degree Kelvin

metrics.name: watts-per-meter-per-degree-kelvin
metrics.display_name: Watts Per Meter Per Degree Kelvin

metrics.name: million-standard-cubic-feet-per-minute
metrics.display_name: Million Standard Cubic Feet Per Minute

metrics.name: million-standard-cubic-feet-per-day
metrics.display_name: Million Standard Cubic Feet Per Day

metrics.name: thousand-standard-cubic-feet-per-day
metrics.display_name: Thousand Standard Cubic Feet Per Day
